title: 1 Heart - 9 Lives
description: All players have only one heart. You cannot respawn after the ninth death.
body:
## 1 Heart - 9 Lives

💔 **This datapack makes it harder for you to play.**  
- All players have only **1 heart.**  
- After **9 deaths**, players can no longer respawn.  
- Designed for those seeking an extreme challenge or creating unique adventure maps.  

⚙️ **Installation:**  
1. Download the datapack file.  
2. Place it in your world’s `datapacks` folder.  
3. Reload the world or use `/reload` to activate the datapack.
